name: self_learner
description: Self-improvement skill for reviewing interactions, identifying knowledge gaps, generating training data, and measuring improvement trends.
author: ObsAI Team

min_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence threshold below which responses are flagged for review

training_pair_format.description: Format for generated training pairs: 'json', 'csv', or 'markdown'

actions.name: review_interactions
actions.description: Review past interactions for improvement opportunities by analyzing response patterns, user feedback signals, and confidence levels.

interactions.description: JSON string containing interaction records or description of interaction patterns to review

actions.name: identify_gaps
actions.description: Identify knowledge gaps based on failed or low-confidence responses, unanswered questions, and topic coverage analysis.

responses.description: JSON string of response records or description of response patterns with confidence levels

actions.name: generate_training
actions.description: Generate training question-answer pairs from existing knowledge to expand coverage and improve response quality.

topic.description: Topic area to generate training pairs for (e.g., 'spl_optimization', 'security_detection', 'data_models')

count.description: Number of training pairs to generate

actions.name: measure_improvement
actions.description: Measure improvement trends over time by analyzing confidence scores, response accuracy, and knowledge coverage metrics.

metrics.description: JSON string of historical metrics or description of metrics to analyze
